title: Decompose Lambda latency into init, ENI, and execution
description: Separate Init Duration, VPC ENI attach, and handler time using X-Ray and Duration metrics before reaching for provisioned concurrency.
body: Use when a Lambda has unpredictable latency. Do not enable provisioned concurrency before knowing where the time goes. Actions: read Init Duration from the REPORT line to size cold-start cost, enable X-Ray to split SDK/downstream time from handler logic, check if the function is VPC-attached (Hyperplane ENI warm-up) and whether package size inflates init, and correlate spikes with ConcurrentExecutions. Validation signals include X-Ray segments attributing the latency, Init Duration shrinking after package trimming, and p99 stabilizing once provisioned concurrency matches the warm-pool need. Risk boundary: changing a production alias weight or VPC subnet is human-gated.
